steps.action: Open app at http://localhost:3102/ and inspect Stats section at desktop viewport
steps.expected: Stats render as a flat flowing row without individual card borders
steps.observed: Stats values render inline under a single Stats heading with no card wrappers

steps.action: Check computed style of the section containing the Stats heading
steps.observed: Computed border is 0px solid with transparent background

evidence.network: GET /market, GET /depth, GET /candles?interval=5m observed during page load/reload

steps.expected: Heading text 'Stats' appears above stats row
steps.observed: Heading 'Stats' is visible directly above Market cap/24H volume/FDV/Total supply

evidence.network: GET /market present while stats values render

steps.expected: Section is named 'About' and includes token description
steps.observed: Section heading is 'About' and contains CASH description text

steps.action: Verify social/link pills in About section
steps.expected: Explorer and Website link pills are present
steps.observed: Explorer and Website pills are visible (plus contract/address pill)

evidence.network: UI remained responsive while API polling continued (GET /market, /trades, /candles)

steps.expected: No card border around transactions/activity section
steps.observed: Transactions heading/table area appears borderless (only table divider lines are present)

steps.action: Check computed styles around Transactions heading container

steps.expected: Active tab indicated by color only, without animated pill background
steps.observed: Trade and Explore are plain text buttons; active state is color difference only

steps.action: Check computed styles for Trade/Explore buttons
steps.expected: Transparent backgrounds and no rounded-pill indicator
steps.observed: Both buttons have transparent background and 0px border radius

evidence.network: Standard page/API polling requests; no nav interaction errors

steps.expected: Opaque background and no backdrop blur effect

evidence.network: GET /market, /depth, /candles, /trades observed; no errors tied to navbar rendering

frictions.description: Chart region alternated between 'Unable to load chart data' and 'No chart data available' while validating layout; did not impact assigned stats/activity/navbar assertions.
frictions.resolution: Continued validation using static UI structure and style checks for assigned assertions only.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions (VAL-STATS-001/002/003, VAL-ACTIVITY-001, VAL-NAV-001/002): all passed with screenshot, console, and network evidence captured.
